basic_details.job_title: GGV Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduation in a relevant field (Engineering, Science, computer application, Management etc.) with a minimum of 55% marks.
qualification.details: Post graduation in a relevant field (Such as Engineering, Science, computer application, Management etc. or related disciplines from a recognized University/Institute. with a minimum of 55% marks.) Experience in technology transfer, innovation management, intellectual property rights (IPR), startup ecosystem, incubation, industry liaison, project management, or technology commercialization. Good communication, report writing, and documentation skills. Experience in handling Government-funded projects shall be preferred.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month fixed.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Fulfillment of minimum qualifications shall not entitle a candidate to be called for the interview. The decision of the University/Selection Committee shall be final and binding.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GGV Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the GGV Research Associate position is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post graduation in a relevant field (Engineering, Science, computer application, Management etc.) with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month, fixed.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the GGV Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their application via email along with all required documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Associate post announced by Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and called for an interview. The University/Selection Committee's decision will be final.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job for the Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh, at Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya.
